records.m_Talk_ENG: Sweetie, you look like you're worried about something.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sweetie, you look like you're worried about something.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sweetie, you look like you're worried about something.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a strange bar this is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a strange bar this is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a strange bar this is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's a kid pestering for candy, and a drunk woman approaching me with a seditious tone for some reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's a kid pestering for candy, and a drunk woman approaching me with a seditious tone for some reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's a kid pestering for candy, and a drunk woman approaching me with a seditious tone for some reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's nice to just sit and have a drink, but if you keep making that scary face, all the customers will run away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's nice to just sit and have a drink, but if you keep making that scary face, all the customers will run away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's nice to just sit and have a drink, but if you keep making that scary face, all the customers will run away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, that monkey. She introduced this place to me to give me the middle finger, didn't she?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, that monkey. She introduced this place to me to give me the middle finger, didn't she?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, that monkey. She introduced this place to me to give me the middle finger, didn't she?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? Did you come here by recommendation? Then I'll make you a drink on the house.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? Did you come here by recommendation? Then I'll make you a drink on the house.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? Did you come here by recommendation? Then I'll make you a drink on the house.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're... not a drunk but an employee of this bar?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're... not a drunk but an employee of this bar?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're... not a drunk but an employee of this bar?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am a drunk, but I'm also the manager. Call me Gremory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am a drunk, but I'm also the manager. Call me Gremory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am a drunk, but I'm also the manager. Call me Gremory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how it's not your real name, you must have a lot to hide, eh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how it's not your real name, you must have a lot to hide, eh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how it's not your real name, you must have a lot to hide, eh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, my. Looks like we got ourselves a mind reader here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, my. Looks like we got ourselves a mind reader here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, my. Looks like we got ourselves a mind reader here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm just here for a drink. I have no business for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm just here for a drink. I have no business for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm just here for a drink. I have no business for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's not a bar in Ground One where you can get drunk as cheaply as ours.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's not a bar in Ground One where you can get drunk as cheaply as ours.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's not a bar in Ground One where you can get drunk as cheaply as ours.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But did you know? We offer fortunetelling for free here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But did you know? We offer fortunetelling for free here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But did you know? We offer fortunetelling for free here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not interested.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not interested.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not interested.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? I'm all ears if you have any concerns you wish to talk about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? I'm all ears if you have any concerns you wish to talk about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? I'm all ears if you have any concerns you wish to talk about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not one to talk about my personal life to a stranger I just met.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not one to talk about my personal life to a stranger I just met.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not one to talk about my personal life to a stranger I just met.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here you go. The manager's special cocktail, Demon Lady.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here you go. The manager's special cocktail, Demon Lady.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here you go. The manager's special cocktail, Demon Lady.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's strong, so be careful not to faint.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's strong, so be careful not to faint.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's strong, so be careful not to faint.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph. Who do you think I am?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph. Who do you think I am?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph. Who do you think I am?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't you have a male friend or a subordinate that you care about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you have a male friend or a subordinate that you care about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you have a male friend or a subordinate that you care about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft...! *Cough!* *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft...! *Cough!* *Cough!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft...! *Cough!* *Cough!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: See? I told you it's strong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: See? I told you it's strong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: See? I told you it's strong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is because you started talking about nonsense!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is because you started talking about nonsense!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is because you started talking about nonsense!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, I won't say a word from now on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, I won't say a word from now on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, I won't say a word from now on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're going to keep staring at me like that, why don't you just say what you want to say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're going to keep staring at me like that, why don't you just say what you want to say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're going to keep staring at me like that, why don't you just say what you want to say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you do have someone you're interested in, right?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you do have someone you're interested in, right?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you do have someone you're interested in, right?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So what if I do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So what if I do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So what if I do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just saying that we could talk about our worries to each other.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just saying that we could talk about our worries to each other.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just saying that we could talk about our worries to each other.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need to be coy in girls' talk, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need to be coy in girls' talk, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need to be coy in girls' talk, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh really? So in your eyes, I look like an ordinary girl who likes to chat, hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh really? So in your eyes, I look like an ordinary girl who likes to chat, hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh really? So in your eyes, I look like an ordinary girl who likes to chat, hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So ordinary people are the only ones allowed to have a chat?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So ordinary people are the only ones allowed to have a chat?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So ordinary people are the only ones allowed to have a chat?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In my case, yes. So don't try to get involved with me that much. Not unless you want to get hurt, that is.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In my case, yes. So don't try to get involved with me that much. Not unless you want to get hurt, that is.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In my case, yes. So don't try to get involved with me that much. Not unless you want to get hurt, that is.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, my. You're like the cold city girl, who doesn't get close to people. How romantic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, my. You're like the cold city girl, who doesn't get close to people. How romantic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, my. You're like the cold city girl, who doesn't get close to people. How romantic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you could just be a bit less mean, you'd be pretty popular. What a shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you could just be a bit less mean, you'd be pretty popular. What a shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you could just be a bit less mean, you'd be pretty popular. What a shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not interested in how others perceive me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not interested in how others perceive me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not interested in how others perceive me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But wouldn't you like to know if anyone has a crush on you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But wouldn't you like to know if anyone has a crush on you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But wouldn't you like to know if anyone has a crush on you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... just don't think it's time to think about that right now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... just don't think it's time to think about that right now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... just don't think it's time to think about that right now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...But who is it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...But who is it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...But who is it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, so you *are* curious. You sly vixen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, so you *are* curious. You sly vixen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, so you *are* curious. You sly vixen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only asked because it looked like you wouldn't leave unless I did.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only asked because it looked like you wouldn't leave unless I did.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only asked because it looked like you wouldn't leave unless I did.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All fortune-telling, whether about love or fate, is purely for entertainment.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All fortune-telling, whether about love or fate, is purely for entertainment.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All fortune-telling, whether about love or fate, is purely for entertainment.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're right. I just do it for fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're right. I just do it for fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're right. I just do it for fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, can you tell me the name of the man you're thinking of? I need it to read your fortune.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, can you tell me the name of the man you're thinking of? I need it to read your fortune.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, can you tell me the name of the man you're thinking of? I need it to read your fortune.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's just for fun, why would I have to tell you that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's just for fun, why would I have to tell you that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's just for fun, why would I have to tell you that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: All you need to do is write his initials on this piece of paper.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All you need to do is write his initials on this piece of paper.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All you need to do is write his initials on this piece of paper.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And next to it, write your initials too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And next to it, write your initials too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And next to it, write your initials too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will this do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will this do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will this do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect. Now let's see what your future holds.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect. Now let's see what your future holds.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect. Now let's see what your future holds.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, let's see what kind of magic you'll do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, let's see what kind of magic you'll do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, let's see what kind of magic you'll do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay... If I connect both initials like this, then add the numbers together...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay... If I connect both initials like this, then add the numbers together...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay... If I connect both initials like this, then add the numbers together...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's this child's play?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's this child's play?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's this child's play?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on. It may look simple, but it's quite accurate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on. It may look simple, but it's quite accurate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on. It may look simple, but it's quite accurate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. Can't believe I trusted the words of a drunkard... How foolish of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. Can't believe I trusted the words of a drunkard... How foolish of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. Can't believe I trusted the words of a drunkard... How foolish of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The man's lucky. Because he met someone like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The man's lucky. Because he met someone like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The man's lucky. Because he met someone like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, I dunno.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, I dunno.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, I dunno.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It says that you two trust each other a lot, far exceeding that of an average acquaintance.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It says that you two trust each other a lot, far exceeding that of an average acquaintance.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It says that you two trust each other a lot, far exceeding that of an average acquaintance.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What an obvious thing to say to draw people in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What an obvious thing to say to draw people in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What an obvious thing to say to draw people in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want to help make his vision come true, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want to help make his vision come true, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want to help make his vision come true, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Although he trusts you with his life, it's different from him relying on you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Although he trusts you with his life, it's different from him relying on you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Although he trusts you with his life, it's different from him relying on you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you fall, he'll continue moving forward without looking back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you fall, he'll continue moving forward without looking back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you fall, he'll continue moving forward without looking back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that's not because he's heartless. That's just his destiny.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that's not because he's heartless. That's just his destiny.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that's not because he's heartless. That's just his destiny.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who... are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who... are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who... are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just a bar owner who enjoys fortune-telling as a hobby.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just a bar owner who enjoys fortune-telling as a hobby.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just a bar owner who enjoys fortune-telling as a hobby.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will he fulfill his destiny?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will he fulfill his destiny?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will he fulfill his destiny?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? I can't see that far into the future.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows? I can't see that far into the future.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? I can't see that far into the future.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because even preordained fates get tangled like a broken clock hand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because even preordained fates get tangled like a broken clock hand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because even preordained fates get tangled like a broken clock hand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But one thing's for sure... and it's that the fate of the future doesn't change who you are today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But one thing's for sure... and it's that the fate of the future doesn't change who you are today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But one thing's for sure... and it's that the fate of the future doesn't change who you are today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So no matter what fate you find yourself in, don't give up so easily.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So no matter what fate you find yourself in, don't give up so easily.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So no matter what fate you find yourself in, don't give up so easily.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you understand what I'm getting at?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you understand what I'm getting at?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you understand what I'm getting at?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You really are amazing, Gremory.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You really are amazing, Gremory.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You really are amazing, Gremory.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even that scary and quiet customer said she'll come back again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even that scary and quiet customer said she'll come back again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even that scary and quiet customer said she'll come back again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Maybe she'll come back with her boyfriend next time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Maybe she'll come back with her boyfriend next time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Maybe she'll come back with her boyfriend next time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you give her some love advice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you give her some love advice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you give her some love advice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Um. I'm not so sure. I can't remember.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Um. I'm not so sure. I can't remember.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Um. I'm not so sure. I can't remember.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're an enigma, Gremory. You always act like a drunk, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're an enigma, Gremory. You always act like a drunk, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're an enigma, Gremory. You always act like a drunk, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You always seem to give helpful advice to all your customers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You always seem to give helpful advice to all your customers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You always seem to give helpful advice to all your customers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what I respect about you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what I respect about you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what I respect about you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aww, my adorable Nicole. I didn't know you thought of me like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aww, my adorable Nicole. I didn't know you thought of me like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aww, my adorable Nicole. I didn't know you thought of me like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But don't you think you're treating me too much like a child by rubbing my cheek against yours?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But don't you think you're treating me too much like a child by rubbing my cheek against yours?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But don't you think you're treating me too much like a child by rubbing my cheek against yours?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's an envelope on the table where she was sitting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's an envelope on the table where she was sitting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's an envelope on the table where she was sitting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An envelope?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An envelope?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An envelope?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It says... "fortune fee"? What does that mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It says... "fortune fee"? What does that mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It says... "fortune fee"? What does that mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think she was trying to express her gratitude... But there seems to have been a huge misunderstanding.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think she was trying to express her gratitude... But there seems to have been a huge misunderstanding.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think she was trying to express her gratitude... But there seems to have been a huge misunderstanding.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, I won't say a word from now on.

root.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, I won't say a word from now on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you're going to keep staring at me like that, why don't you just say what you want to say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you're going to keep staring at me like that, why don't you just say what you want to say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you're going to keep staring at me like that, why don't you just say what you want to say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you do have someone you're interested in, right?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you do have someone you're interested in, right?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you do have someone you're interested in, right?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So what if I do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So what if I do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So what if I do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just saying that we could talk about our worries to each other.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just saying that we could talk about our worries to each other.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just saying that we could talk about our worries to each other.

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need to be coy in girls' talk, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need to be coy in girls' talk, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need to be coy in girls' talk, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh really? So in your eyes, I look like an ordinary girl who likes to chat, hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh really? So in your eyes, I look like an ordinary girl who likes to chat, hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh really? So in your eyes, I look like an ordinary girl who likes to chat, hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So ordinary people are the only ones allowed to have a chat?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So ordinary people are the only ones allowed to have a chat?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So ordinary people are the only ones allowed to have a chat?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In my case, yes. So don't try to get involved with me that much. Not unless you want to get hurt, that is.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In my case, yes. So don't try to get involved with me that much. Not unless you want to get hurt, that is.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In my case, yes. So don't try to get involved with me that much. Not unless you want to get hurt, that is.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, my. You're like the cold city girl, who doesn't get close to people. How romantic.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, my. You're like the cold city girl, who doesn't get close to people. How romantic.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, my. You're like the cold city girl, who doesn't get close to people. How romantic.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you could just be a bit less mean, you'd be pretty popular. What a shame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you could just be a bit less mean, you'd be pretty popular. What a shame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you could just be a bit less mean, you'd be pretty popular. What a shame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not interested in how others perceive me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not interested in how others perceive me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not interested in how others perceive me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But wouldn't you like to know if anyone has a crush on you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But wouldn't you like to know if anyone has a crush on you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But wouldn't you like to know if anyone has a crush on you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... just don't think it's time to think about that right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... just don't think it's time to think about that right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... just don't think it's time to think about that right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...But who is it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...But who is it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...But who is it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm, so you *are* curious. You sly vixen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm, so you *are* curious. You sly vixen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm, so you *are* curious. You sly vixen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I only asked because it looked like you wouldn't leave unless I did.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I only asked because it looked like you wouldn't leave unless I did.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I only asked because it looked like you wouldn't leave unless I did.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All fortune-telling, whether about love or fate, is purely for entertainment.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All fortune-telling, whether about love or fate, is purely for entertainment.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All fortune-telling, whether about love or fate, is purely for entertainment.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're right. I just do it for fun.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're right. I just do it for fun.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're right. I just do it for fun.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, can you tell me the name of the man you're thinking of? I need it to read your fortune.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, can you tell me the name of the man you're thinking of? I need it to read your fortune.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, can you tell me the name of the man you're thinking of? I need it to read your fortune.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's just for fun, why would I have to tell you that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's just for fun, why would I have to tell you that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's just for fun, why would I have to tell you that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: All you need to do is write his initials on this piece of paper.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All you need to do is write his initials on this piece of paper.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All you need to do is write his initials on this piece of paper.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And next to it, write your initials too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And next to it, write your initials too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And next to it, write your initials too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will this do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will this do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will this do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Perfect. Now let's see what your future holds.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Perfect. Now let's see what your future holds.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Perfect. Now let's see what your future holds.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, let's see what kind of magic you'll do.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, let's see what kind of magic you'll do.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, let's see what kind of magic you'll do.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay... If I connect both initials like this, then add the numbers together...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay... If I connect both initials like this, then add the numbers together...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay... If I connect both initials like this, then add the numbers together...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What's this child's play?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What's this child's play?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What's this child's play?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, come on. It may look simple, but it's quite accurate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, come on. It may look simple, but it's quite accurate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, come on. It may look simple, but it's quite accurate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. Can't believe I trusted the words of a drunkard... How foolish of me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. Can't believe I trusted the words of a drunkard... How foolish of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. Can't believe I trusted the words of a drunkard... How foolish of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The man's lucky. Because he met someone like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The man's lucky. Because he met someone like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The man's lucky. Because he met someone like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, I dunno.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, I dunno.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, I dunno.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It says that you two trust each other a lot, far exceeding that of an average acquaintance.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It says that you two trust each other a lot, far exceeding that of an average acquaintance.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It says that you two trust each other a lot, far exceeding that of an average acquaintance.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What an obvious thing to say to draw people in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What an obvious thing to say to draw people in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What an obvious thing to say to draw people in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You want to help make his vision come true, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You want to help make his vision come true, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You want to help make his vision come true, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Although he trusts you with his life, it's different from him relying on you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Although he trusts you with his life, it's different from him relying on you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Although he trusts you with his life, it's different from him relying on you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even if you fall, he'll continue moving forward without looking back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even if you fall, he'll continue moving forward without looking back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even if you fall, he'll continue moving forward without looking back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But that's not because he's heartless. That's just his destiny.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But that's not because he's heartless. That's just his destiny.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But that's not because he's heartless. That's just his destiny.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who... are you?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who... are you?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who... are you?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just a bar owner who enjoys fortune-telling as a hobby.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just a bar owner who enjoys fortune-telling as a hobby.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just a bar owner who enjoys fortune-telling as a hobby.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Will he fulfill his destiny?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Will he fulfill his destiny?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Will he fulfill his destiny?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? I can't see that far into the future.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows? I can't see that far into the future.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? I can't see that far into the future.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because even preordained fates get tangled like a broken clock hand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because even preordained fates get tangled like a broken clock hand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because even preordained fates get tangled like a broken clock hand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But one thing's for sure... and it's that the fate of the future doesn't change who you are today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But one thing's for sure... and it's that the fate of the future doesn't change who you are today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But one thing's for sure... and it's that the fate of the future doesn't change who you are today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So no matter what fate you find yourself in, don't give up so easily.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So no matter what fate you find yourself in, don't give up so easily.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So no matter what fate you find yourself in, don't give up so easily.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you understand what I'm getting at?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you understand what I'm getting at?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you understand what I'm getting at?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You really are amazing, Gremory.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You really are amazing, Gremory.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You really are amazing, Gremory.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even that scary and quiet customer said she'll come back again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even that scary and quiet customer said she'll come back again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even that scary and quiet customer said she'll come back again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Really? Maybe she'll come back with her boyfriend next time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Really? Maybe she'll come back with her boyfriend next time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Really? Maybe she'll come back with her boyfriend next time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you give her some love advice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you give her some love advice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you give her some love advice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Um. I'm not so sure. I can't remember.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Um. I'm not so sure. I can't remember.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Um. I'm not so sure. I can't remember.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're an enigma, Gremory. You always act like a drunk, but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're an enigma, Gremory. You always act like a drunk, but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're an enigma, Gremory. You always act like a drunk, but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You always seem to give helpful advice to all your customers.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You always seem to give helpful advice to all your customers.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You always seem to give helpful advice to all your customers.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's what I respect about you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's what I respect about you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's what I respect about you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aww, my adorable Nicole. I didn't know you thought of me like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aww, my adorable Nicole. I didn't know you thought of me like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aww, my adorable Nicole. I didn't know you thought of me like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But don't you think you're treating me too much like a child by rubbing my cheek against yours?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But don't you think you're treating me too much like a child by rubbing my cheek against yours?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But don't you think you're treating me too much like a child by rubbing my cheek against yours?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's an envelope on the table where she was sitting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's an envelope on the table where she was sitting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's an envelope on the table where she was sitting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: An envelope?
root.m_Talk_DEU: An envelope?
root.m_Talk_FRA: An envelope?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It says... "fortune fee"? What does that mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It says... "fortune fee"? What does that mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It says... "fortune fee"? What does that mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think she was trying to express her gratitude... But there seems to have been a huge misunderstanding.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think she was trying to express her gratitude... But there seems to have been a huge misunderstanding.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think she was trying to express her gratitude... But there seems to have been a huge misunderstanding.
